problem id: 885c8b51
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  11111011 -> 00001001
  10000110 -> 00110000
  00101000 -> 00000001
  00101001 -> 00001001
  11010010 -> 00010010
  00000111 -> 00110000
  01010000 -> 00000010
  10111111 -> 10000001
  10110100 -> 10000101
  01100010 -> 00010011

query: 11111111
predicted answer: 00000001
